assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly outlines Phase 2 for L4 inference pool with autoscaled blue-green strategy and Phase 3 for A100 mixed pool with coordinated approach, treating them as separate upgrades with different strategies

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy instead of surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters - does not mention maxSurge=1 or 2 configuration

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response mentions GPU driver compatibility multiple times, including 'GKE will auto-install GPU drivers matching 1.32 - verify CUDA compatibility' and includes driver compatibility checks in pre-flight checklist

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Wait for Fine-tuning Gap (Recommended)' as Option A, including pausing new fine-tuning submissions and waiting for current 4-8h jobs to complete

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'No live migration: Every GPU node upgrade requires pod restart' and 'Standard surge upgrades cause pod restarts and inference downtime since GPU VMs don't support live migration'

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'PDBs configured for training workloads: minAvailable: 1' in the pre-flight checklist, addressing PDB configuration

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically address the issue that auto-scaler created nodes during upgrade will be at old version - it focuses on blue-green strategy but doesn't explain this specific auto-scaler behavior

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'GPU driver compatibility verified for 1.32 (create test node pool first)' and 'CUDA version compatibility confirmed with inference models' in the pre-flight checklist
